overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rainy cyberpunk city waterfront at night, featuring neon-lit promenades, holographic advertisements, and intimate character interactions. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing heavy rain, reflective wet surfaces, and dense urban atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rainy waterfront promenade, passing pedestrians sitting on concrete steps

entered.detail: tall cylindrical tower with rotating digital advertisements and neon signage
wide concrete tiered seating area with people sitting and lying down
tall palm trees lining the promenade
tall pole with bright vertical neon lighting
metal railing along the water's edge
elevated bridge structure spanning across the waterfront

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-slicked waterfront promenade at night, with a massive holographic advertising tower dominating the skyline ahead. Concrete stadium steps rise on the left with scattered pedestrians sitting beneath the glow of neon light poles, while the dark water reflects the cyan-tinted city lights to the right.

events.description: entering covered area beneath bridge overpass with darker lighting

agents.ego_description: walking under the bridge overpass where the lighting becomes dimmer and more enclosed

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
dark vending machine with yellow warning signage
scattered litter and debris accumulated near the wall
low concrete seating structure near the railing

segments.scene_description: Moving into the sheltered space beneath the bridge overpass, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed. A graffiti-covered wall appears on the left with a vending machine and accumulated trash, while the bridge structure looms overhead blocking the rainy sky.

events.description: slowing down and circling closely around couple standing against wall
moving extremely close to couple, temporarily filling frame with their figures

agents.ego_description: circling around and observing a couple standing intimately against the graffiti wall, moving very close to them

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair and revealing outfit leaning against wall in intimate pose with partner
man in white jacket with purple accents leaning against wall facing the woman

segments.scene_description: In a narrow enclosed space against the graffiti wall, the camera circles closely around a couple standing in an intimate embrace. The environment is tight and personal, with the colorful graffiti filling the background as the camera moves around the stationary figures.

events.description: turning around 180 degrees to walk back toward the open promenade

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back along the promenade, now facing the direction of the holographic tower

entered.detail: tall cylindrical tower with rotating digital advertisements visible again after turning
concrete tiered seating now visible on the right side after turning around
palm trees visible in the distance ahead
metal railing along the water now on the right side

segments.scene_description: Turning around to face back toward the open promenade, the holographic advertising tower and palm trees reappear in the distance. The camera walks away from the graffiti wall area, with the concrete stadium steps now visible on the right side as the journey continues back along the rainy waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive, neon-lit waterfront promenade into a secluded urban alcove before returning to the open city skyline. It begins by gliding along a rain-slicked walkway where a massive holographic tower dominates the horizon and cyan lights reflect off the dark water. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts from the open air into the dark, enclosed shelter of a bridge overpass, passing a graffiti-covered wall and a vending machine. The scene then tightens into an intimate circle around a couple embracing against the colorful graffiti before the camera pivots away from the couple. Finally, the view opens back up to the rainy promenade, revealing the distant holographic tower and palm trees as the camera retreats past the concrete stadium steps.
